results.content: Directory Compare alternative is FreeFileSync, which is both free and Open Source. Other great apps like Directory Compare are rsync, GoodSync, SyncToy and DirSync Pro. Is Alternate File Move a good alternative to Directory Compare? Is MacDropAny a good alternative to Directory Compare? Is WinDataReflector a good alternative to Directory Compare? Is Organyze SYNC a good [...] # Directory Compare Alternatives. Directory Compare is described as 'Utility to help you keeping copies of your important directories (documents, programs under development and so on) in a backup hard disk or any other storage system (like USB drives or CD-RW disks)' and is a File Sync tool in the backup & sync category. There are more than 10 alternatives to Directory Compare for a variety of platforms, including Windows, Mac, Linux, Android and Android Tablet apps. The best Directory Compare

results.content:
Remaining data to be transferred

Tracks and displays how much data and files are left to transfer.

Resilio supports synchronizing millions of files per job.

### Use Cases

#### Data Migration

Moving data into and out of the Cloud or between Clouds.

#### Multi-Cloud

Supports replication across concurrent Cloud environments for maximum flexibility or Disaster Recovery.

Move on-premises file shares to the cloud.

results.title: Sync | A secure Google Drive alternative
results.content:
# Sync.com vs. Google Drive

Sync is a secure Google Drive alternative that saves you money and respects your privacy.

TRY SYNC FOR FREE

PC Mag badge saying Sync is a solid, secure Google Drive cloud storage alternative

## All the reasons to #DeGoogle your cloud storage

### Better privacy protection included

Sync includes innovative data privacy protection features designed to limit how much of your data we (or anyone else) can access. No compromises. Google, not so much. [...] Trusting Google with your data long-term is risky business because you never know when they will shut you down. Trust a cloud storage specialist and join millions of businesses in Sync!

## Compare Google Drive on price

## Switch to Sync today [...] Sync is your best alternative to Google Drive because you get more storage, more features, and more privacy for a better price! It’s no wonder millions of people have made the choice to take a stand, and get the cloud storage they deserve with Sync. Moving your files from Google Drive to Sync is easy too! And if you need help, Sync has a real in-house support team to ensure you always get personal and dedicated help.

results.title: A Secure, Fast, Cloud Sync Solution | Resilio
results.content: A Secure, Fast, Cloud Sync Solution | Resilio [...] for NetApp ONTAP, and Azure NetApp Files. For NetApp customers requiring universal, scale-out, active-active (uni- , bi-, and omni-directional) file delivery from on-premises data centers to the cloud - or from the cloud to on-premises data centers - Resilio offers a complementary alternative to NetApp Cloud Sync. Resilio Platform, A Complementary Alternative to NetApp Cloud Sync. # Compare Resilio Platform Vs. NetApp Cloud Sync. NetApp Cloud Sync is a NetApp cloud-based product that connects [...] with no operational disruption so you can get going fast. Resilio natively supports Azure Blob & Files, S3, Google Cloud, and any S3-compatible object storage. Bring your own cloud (BYOC) or local storage solutions and Resilio Platform will work on day one with no operational disruption so you can get going fast. Resilio Platform provides a VPN alternative solution, with fast and secure data access.
